title: Research
text: My work is centered on understanding how structural properties of surfaces influence their electronic and magnetic behavior.

title: Research
text: My work is centered on understanding how structural properties of surfaces influence their electronic and magnetic behavior.

title: Research
text:
Main Research Topics

Surface Science
Investigation of atomic-scale structure and its impact on physical properties, especially in low-dimensional systems.



Two-Dimensional Materials and Nanostructures
Study of materials such as graphene, hexagonal boron nitride, and transition metal dichalcogenides, including supported systems.



Experimental Techniques

X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy (XPS)
X-ray Photoelectron Diffraction (XPD)
Angle-Resolved Photoemission Spectroscopy (ARPES)
Scanning Tunneling Microscopy and Spectroscopy (STM/STS)




Computational Methods
Use of Density Functional Theory (DFT) to:

Calculate electronic structure
Simulate STM images
Support and interpret experimental results

title: Home
text:
Adjunct Professor
Federal University of Technology – Paraná (UTFPR)
Ponta Grossa-PR, Brazil



Surface science, two-dimensional materials, STM/STS, XPS/XPD/ARPES, DFT, and machine learning applied to surface analysis.




My research focuses on the relationship between atomic structure and electronic/magnetic properties of surfaces, particularly in low-dimensional systems.
I combine experimental techniques with first-principles simulations to investigate supported nanostructures and two-dimensional materials.

title: Publications

Abreu, G. J. P., A. Pancotti, L. H. de Lima, R. Landers, and A. de Siervo. 2013. “Photoelectron Diffraction Study of Rh Nanoparticles Growth on Fe\(_3\)o\(_4\)/Pd(111) Ultrathin Film.” Journal of Nanoparticle Research 15 (4): 1510. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11051-013-1510-z.


Barreto, Lucas, Luis Henrique de Lima, Daniel Coutinho Martins, et al. 2020. “Selecting ‘Convenient Observers’ to Probe the Atomic Structure of CVD Graphene on Ir(111) via Photoelectron Diffraction.” Journal of Physics: Condensed Matter 33 (10): 105001. https://doi.org/10.1088/1361-648X/abceff.

Silva, Richard Landers, and Abner de Siervo. 2018. “Unraveling the Atomic Structure of Fe Intercalated Under Graphene on Ir(111): A Multitechnique Approach.” Chemistry of Materials 30 (20): 7201–10. https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.chemmater.8b03186.

do Amaral, Gabriela Moura, Isabela da Costa Tonon, Ricardo Javier Peña Román, et al. 2021. “Epitaxial Growth, Electronic Hybridization and Stability Under Oxidation of Monolayer MoS2 on Ag(111).” Applied Surface Science 538: 148138. https://doi.org/https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apsusc.2020.148138.

Herrera-Reinoza, Nataly, Alisson Ceccatto dos Santos, Luis Henrique de Lima, Richard Landers, and Abner de Siervo. 2021. “Atomically Precise Bottom-up Synthesis of h-BNC: Graphene Doped with h-BN Nanoclusters.” Chemistry of Materials 33 (8): 2871–82. https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.chemmater.1c00081.


Lima, L H de, T Greber, and M Muntwiler. 2020. “The True Corrugation of a h-BN Nanomesh Layer.” 2D Materials 7 (3): 035006. https://doi.org/10.1088/2053-1583/ab81ae.


Lima, L H de, and A de Siervo. 2024. “X-Ray Photoelectron Diffraction as a Modern Tool for Determining Surface Stacking Sequence in Layered Materials.” 2D Materials 11 (2): 025018. https://doi.org/10.1088/2053-1583/ad2526.


Lima, L. H. de, H. Y. Cun, A. Hemmi, T. Kälin, and T. Greber. 2013. “Note: An Ion Source for Alkali Metal Implantation Beneath Graphene and Hexagonal Boron Nitride Monolayers on Transition Metals.” Review of Scientific Instruments 84 (12): 126104. https://doi.org/10.1063/1.4848936.


Lima, L. H. de, A. de Siervo, R. Landers, et al. 2013. “Atomic Surface Structure of Graphene and Its Buffer Layer on SiC(0001): A Chemical-Specific Photoelectron Diffraction Approach.” Phys. Rev. B 87 (February): 081403. https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevB.87.081403.


Lima, Luis Henrique de, Lucas Barreto, Richard Landers, and Abner de Siervo. 2016. “Surface Structure Determination of Black Phosphorus Using Photoelectron Diffraction.” Phys. Rev. B 93 (January): 035448. https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevB.93.035448.


Lima, Luis Henrique de, Dominique Handschak, Frank Schönbohm, Richard Landers, Carsten Westphal, and Abner de Siervo. 2014. “The Atomic Structure of a Bare Buffer Layer on SiC(0001) Chemically Resolved.” Chem. Commun. 50: 13571–74. https://doi.org/10.1039/C4CC05005C.


Lima, Luis Henrique de, Richard Landers, and Abner de Siervo. 2014. “Patterning Quasi-Periodic Co 2D-Clusters Underneath Graphene on SiC(0001).” Chemistry of Materials 26 (14): 4172–77. https://doi.org/10.1021/cm501976b.


Lima, Luis Henrique de, Wendell Simões e Silva, Iago Aédon Silva Prior, Richard Landers, and Abner de Siervo. 2023. “Zn Vacancies as Hydrogen Trap Sites in Polar Surfaces: A New Stabilization Mechanism for the ZnO(0001)-(2×2) Surface Reconstruction.” The Journal of Physical Chemistry C 127 (18): 8795–802. https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jpcc.3c00567.


Rivera, Daniel, Pedro Venezuela, Luis H. de Lima, Ana Champi, and Lucas Barreto. 2026. “DFT+u: A Hubbard Hamiltonian-Based Correction for Modeling Localized Electronic States.” Revista Brasileira de Ensino de Física 48: e20250340. https://doi.org/10.1590/1806-9126-RBEF-2025-0340.


Wang, Xiao-Ye, Thomas Dienel, Marco Di Giovannantonio, et al. 2017. “Heteroatom-Doped Perihexacene from a Double Helicene Precursor: On-Surface Synthesis and Properties.” Journal of the American Chemical Society 139 (13): 4671–74. https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.7b02258.

title: About
text:
Luis Henrique de Lima received his B.Sc. (2009) and Ph.D. (2014) in Physics from the State University of Campinas (Unicamp), Brazil.
During his Ph.D., he was a visiting researcher at the University of Zurich, Switzerland (2013).
He carried out postdoctoral research at the Institute of Physics of Unicamp (2015, 2017) and at the PEARL beamline of the Swiss Light Source (SLS), Switzerland (2016).
From 2018 to 2025, he was an Adjunct Professor at the Federal University of ABC (UFABC), Santo André-SP, Brazil.
Since 2025, he has been an Adjunct Professor at the Federal University of Technology – Paraná (UTFPR), Ponta Grossa-PR, Brazil.
